scripts.tunnel:cloudflare: wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cloudflared tunnel --protocol http2 --edge-ip-version 4 --url http://127.0.0.1:3000
scripts.stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = @(3000, 20241); foreach ($port in $ports) { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'tunnelmole|cloudflared|lt --port 3000|localtunnel|http-server \\. -p 3000|wait-on http://localhost:3000|concurrently -n server,tunnel' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
